info.title: Insta Buddy API
info.summary: Plan, publish and manage social content across every account you own or buy.
info.description:
The Insta Buddy API is the single programmable surface behind the web app, the MCP server, the SDKs and the CLI. Every resource here maps 1:1 to a page in the product (Phase 3) and to a business workflow (Phase 2).

Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`. Every request is scoped to exactly one Workspace, resolved from the key. Cursor pagination, one filter grammar, one error envelope. Additive changes ship on `/v1`; breaking changes ship on `/v2`.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Plan, schedule, publish and manage content.

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: Upload and manage the media used by posts.

tags.name: Accounts
tags.description: Connect and manage the social accounts posts publish to.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Browse purchasable offerings in the Store catalog.

tags.name: Members
tags.description: People and AI agents in the workspace.

get.description:
### What
Return every connected or delivered Social Account.

### When to use
Accounts page; account picker in `posts.create`.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `accounts.get`, `posts.create`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: List all social accounts in the workspace.
get.x-ai-example: How many active IG accounts do I have?

post.description:
### What
Connect an account you own to the workspace using credentials obtained via the connect flow.

### When to use
Bring-your-own account. Bought accounts arrive via Deliveries.

### Before / After
- **Before:** Run the OAuth/credential exchange to get `credentials_ref`.
- **After:** `accounts.get`, `posts.create`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.description:
### What
Return one Social Account by id.

### When to use
Account detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `accounts.list`.
- **After:** `accounts.list_posts`, `accounts.rotate`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

patch.description:
### What
Rename, retag, or update display name.

### When to use
Housekeeping.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `accounts.get`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
patch.x-ai-summary: Rename or tag a social account.

delete.description:
### What
Set the account to `retired`. History and past Posts are preserved.

### When to use
Account no longer used.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `accounts.get`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.description:
### What
Same shape as `posts.list`, pre-filtered.

### When to use
Account detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `accounts.get`.
- **After:** `posts.get`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: List posts on this social account.
get.x-ai-example: What have I posted on acc_... this month?

post.description:
### What
Replace stored credentials. Used after platform re-auth or an `needs_attention` event.

### When to use
An Activity `account.needs_attention` fires.

### Before / After
- **Before:** Run the re-auth flow to get a new `credentials_ref`.
- **After:** `accounts.get` — expect `active`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Rotate credentials on a social account.
post.x-ai-example: I re-authorized acc_...; save the new credentials.

get.description:
### What
Immutable, workspace-wide event log. Newest first.

### When to use
Activity page; agent audits its own actions.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** Open the referenced resource via its own tag.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What did the AI agent do in the last hour?

get.description:
### What
Return one activity event by id.

### When to use
Debugging a specific event.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `activity.list`.
- **After:** Open the referenced object.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Return uploaded assets in the current workspace.

### When to use

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `assets.get`, `posts.create`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: Show me all my reels tagged 'summer'.

post.description:
### What
Reserve an Asset record and return a pre-signed upload URL. Two-step upload.

### When to use
Before attaching media to a Post.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** PUT bytes to the returned URL, then `assets.complete`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Reserve an asset and get an upload URL.

get.description:
### What
Return one Asset by id, including status and CDN URL when `ready`.

### When to use
Asset detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.list`.
- **After:** `assets.update`, `posts.create`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: Fetch a single asset by id.

patch.description:
### What
Rename or retag an Asset.

### When to use
Library organization.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.get`.
- **After:** `assets.list`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

delete.description:
### What
Delete an unreferenced Asset. Fails with `conflict` if any Post references it.

### When to use
Library cleanup.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.list_posts` to check references.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

post.description:
### What
Finalize the upload started by `assets.create`. Kicks off server-side processing.

### When to use
Immediately after successful PUT to the pre-signed URL.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.create` and PUT the bytes.
- **After:** Poll `assets.get`; use once `status = ready`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.summary: List posts that use this asset
get.description:
### What
Return posts referencing the asset. Same shape as `posts.list`.

### When to use
Asset detail page; before delete.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.get`.
- **After:** `posts.get`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

200.description: List posts that use this asset

get.description:
### What
Return every Delivery in the workspace.

### When to use
Store → Deliveries tab.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `deliveries.accept`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: Which deliveries are ready to accept?

get.description:
### What
Return one Delivery by id.

### When to use
Delivery detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `deliveries.list` or `orders.list_deliveries`.
- **After:** `deliveries.accept`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

post.description:
### What
Accept the handover. Included Social Accounts move to `active` in Accounts.

### When to use
Customer confirms delivery contents look right.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `deliveries.get` (status must be `ready`).
- **After:** `accounts.list`, `posts.create`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Report a problem with delivered accounts.

### When to use
One or more accounts don't work.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `deliveries.get`.
- **After:** `orders.replacement`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Report an issue with a delivery.
post.x-ai-example: Two accounts in del_... are shadow-banned.

get.description: Liveness probe. No auth required.

### What
Return the current member and workspace.

### When to use
Boot; showing 'signed in as'.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: Return the caller's member and workspace.
get.x-ai-example: Who am I signed in as?

get.description: Return this OpenAPI document. No auth required.

### What
Return the current workspace's orders.

### When to use
Store → Orders tab.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `orders.get`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What orders do I have pending?

post.description:
### What
Create an Order and return a `checkout_url`. Order stays `pending` until payment.

### When to use
Buy accounts.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `products.list`.
- **After:** Send user to `checkout_url`; wait for `order.paid` → `delivery.ready`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.description:
### What
Return one Order by id, including linked Deliveries.

### When to use
Order detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `orders.list`.
- **After:** `orders.list_deliveries`, `deliveries.accept`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Return the Deliveries that belong to this Order.

### When to use
Order detail page.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `orders.get`.
- **After:** `deliveries.accept`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

post.description:
### What
File a replacement request against an Order (typically after an issue on a Delivery).

### When to use
Delivery had bad accounts and warranty window is open.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `deliveries.report_issue` optionally.
- **After:** Wait for Activity `order.fulfilled` again with new Deliveries.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Request replacement accounts for an order.
post.x-ai-example: Two accounts from ord_... don't work; request replacements.

get.description:
### What
Return posts in the current workspace, most recently scheduled first.

### When to use
Any Posts view (Calendar/Board/List) uses this; agents call it to enumerate scheduled or failed work.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `accounts.list` to know which account to filter by.
- **After:** `posts.get` or `posts.publish` on a specific id.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: List posts with optional status, account, or time-window filters.
get.x-ai-example: Show me every failed post from the last 24 hours.

post.description:
### What
Create a Post in `draft`, or in `scheduled` if `scheduled_at` is provided.

### When to use
Customer plans a post from the UI or an agent drafts one via MCP.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `assets.create` + `assets.complete` for any media; `accounts.list` for the destination.
- **After:** `posts.schedule`, `posts.publish`, or `posts.update`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Create a new post targeting one social account with one or more assets.
post.x-ai-example: Schedule a reel of summer-teaser.mp4 to @brand_alpha for tomorrow at 6pm.

get.description:
### What
Return one Post by id, including current status and failure detail if any.

### When to use
Post detail page; agent inspecting the result of an action.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.list` or the id returned by `posts.create`.
- **After:** `posts.update`, `posts.publish`, `posts.cancel`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: Fetch a single post by id.

patch.description:
### What
Update caption, first comment, tags, campaign, or attached assets. Only allowed while `draft` or `scheduled`.

### When to use
Customer edits copy before publish; agent revises AI-generated draft.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get`.
- **After:** `posts.publish` or `posts.schedule`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
patch.x-ai-summary: Update a draft or scheduled post.
patch.x-ai-example: Change the caption of post_01H... to 'Launch day!'.

delete.description:
### What
Permanently delete a Post that has never been scheduled or published.

### When to use
Cleanup of drafts. Scheduled or published posts must be cancelled instead.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get` to confirm status is `draft`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

post.description:
### What
Move a Post to `cancelled`. Not allowed once `published`.

### When to use
Customer withdraws before publish; agent aborts a mistaken draft.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get` (status ≠ `published`).
- **After:** `posts.list` to refresh.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Cancel a scheduled or failed post.
post.x-ai-example: Cancel every post scheduled for tomorrow.

post.description:
### What
Create a new `draft` Post copying caption, assets, tags, and campaign from the source.

### When to use
Customer repurposes a Post to another account or time slot.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get`.
- **After:** `posts.update`, `posts.schedule`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Duplicate a post as a new draft.

post.description:
### What
Publish immediately regardless of `scheduled_at`. Returns the updated Post; the platform confirmation is asynchronous.

### When to use
Customer clicks Publish Now; agent responds to 'post this now'.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get` (status must be `draft`, `scheduled`, or `failed`).
- **After:** `posts.status` to poll `publishing` → `published` / `failed`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Re-attempt publish on a Post whose status is `failed`.

### When to use
After a transient platform failure; visible in Activity as `post.failed`.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.get` (status must be `failed`).
- **After:** `posts.status`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-example: Retry every failed post from last night.

post.description:
### What
Move a Post to `scheduled` at the given time. Rescheduling an already-scheduled Post is allowed.

### When to use
Customer picks a time; agent schedules AI-drafted content.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.create` (draft) or `posts.get`.
- **After:** `posts.status`, `posts.publish`, `posts.cancel`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Set or change the scheduled time of a post.
post.x-ai-example: Push post_01H... to next Monday at 9am UTC.

get.description:
### What
Return the narrow lifecycle snapshot (id, status, updated_at). Cheap; safe to poll.

### When to use
Polling after `publish`, `retry`, or a bulk operation.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.publish`, `posts.retry`, or `posts.bulk_reschedule`.
- **After:** `posts.get` for full detail once terminal.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-summary: Cheap lifecycle status of a post.

post.description:
### What
Cancel up to 500 Posts in one call. Returns an async operation handle.

### When to use
Campaign paused; agent cleans up bad drafts.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.list` with `status=scheduled`.
- **After:** `posts.list` or per-post `posts.status`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-example: Cancel all posts I have scheduled for this weekend.

post.description:
### What
Reschedule up to 500 Posts in one call. Returns an async operation handle.

### When to use
Time-shift a campaign; move everything past a holiday.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `posts.list`.
- **After:** Poll operation via `posts.status` per id or via Activity.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-example: Push everything scheduled for Monday to Tuesday.

get.description:

### Before / After

- **After:** `orders.create`.

Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What IG account packages do you sell?

Return one product by id.

### When to use

### Before / After

- **After:** `orders.create`.

Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Search across posts, assets, accounts, orders, deliveries, members, activity.

### When to use
Cmd-K bar; agent orienting inside an unfamiliar workspace.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** Open the returned resource via its own tag.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### What
Return the current workspace singleton.

### When to use
Settings → General.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `workspace.update`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What timezone is my workspace in?

### What

### When to use

### Before / After
- **Before:** `workspace.get`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
patch.x-ai-example: Set my workspace timezone to Europe/Paris.

get.description:
### What
Return API keys in the workspace. Secrets are never returned.

### When to use
Settings → API Keys.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `api_keys.create` or `api_keys.delete`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What API keys exist in my workspace?

post.description:
### What
Create a new API key. The full secret is returned exactly once.

### When to use
Setting up automation, MCP, or a CI job.

### Before / After
- **Before:** Decide the scope set.
- **After:** Store the secret; use it as `Authorization: Bearer <secret>`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Create an API key with explicit scopes.
post.x-ai-example: Create a key for GitHub Actions that can publish posts.

get.description:
### What
Return one API key's metadata.

### When to use
Settings → API Keys.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `api_keys.list`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

delete.description:
### What
Immediately revoke an API key. Subsequent calls with it return `unauthenticated`.

### When to use
Rotation, offboarding, or leak.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `api_keys.get`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.description:
### What

### When to use
Settings → Members.

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `members.update` or `members.delete`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: Who has access to my workspace?

post.description:

### When to use

### Before / After

- **After:** Recipient accepts the emailed invitation.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Invite a new member by email.

### When to use

### Before / After

### Before / After
- **Before:** `members.get`.
- **After:** —

delete.description:

### Before / After
- **Before:** `members.get`.
- **After:** —

### Before / After
- **Before:** —
- **After:** `notifications.read`.

Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### When to use

### Before / After

Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

### Before / After

- **After:** —

get.description:
### What

### When to use

### Before / After

- **After:** `webhooks.create` or `webhooks.update`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
get.x-ai-example: What webhooks am I subscribed to?

post.description:
### What
Subscribe a URL to one or more event types.

### When to use
Wiring external automation.

### Before / After
- **Before:** Decide the URL and event set.
- **After:** Trigger a test event; use `webhooks.replay_delivery` if needed.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-summary: Subscribe an HTTPS endpoint to workspace events.

get.description:
### What
Return one webhook.

### When to use
Settings → Webhooks.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `webhooks.list`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

patch.description:
### What
Change URL, events, or active state.

### When to use
Rotating endpoints; adjusting event subscription.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `webhooks.get`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

delete.description:
### What
Delete a webhook subscription.

### When to use
Endpoint retired.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `webhooks.get`.
- **After:** —

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

get.description:
### What

### When to use
Debugging a broken receiver.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `webhooks.get`.
- **After:** `webhooks.replay_delivery`.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.

post.description:
### What
Re-send a specific delivery attempt.

### When to use
Receiver was down at delivery time.

### Before / After
- **Before:** `webhooks.list_deliveries`.
- **After:** `webhooks.list_deliveries` — expect a new attempt.

### Notes
Idempotency-Key accepted on all mutating requests. Cross-workspace access returns `not_found`, never `forbidden`.
post.x-ai-example: Retry delivery wd_... for webhook wh_....

post.description:
### What
Issue a new signing secret. Returned once.

### When to use
Suspected leak.

### Before / After

- **After:** Update receiver.

Provenance.description: Who/what created this resource. Present on every resource.

created_by.description: Member id of the human or AI that created the resource.

agent.description: Name of the AI agent, when `created_via = mcp` or the actor is an AI Member.

PageMeta.description: Cursor pagination metadata attached to every collection response.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor to pass as `cursor` on the next request. Omitted when exhausted.

RateLimitMeta.description: Rate-limit snapshot for the current key.

Error.description: Stable error shape. HTTP status is derived from `code`; see the errors reference.

details.description: Flat `field → reason` map for `invalid_input`; free-form otherwise.

Operation.description: Async operation handle returned by bulk actions and upload finalize.

x-enum-descriptions.draft: Editable, not yet on the schedule.
x-enum-descriptions.scheduled: On the schedule, not yet handed to the platform.
x-enum-descriptions.publishing: Handed to the platform; awaiting confirmation.
x-enum-descriptions.published: Confirmed live on the destination Social Account.
x-enum-descriptions.failed: Platform rejected the publish; retry allowed.

x-enum-descriptions.uploading: Bytes are being uploaded to the pre-signed URL.

AccountStatus.description: Lifecycle state of a Social Account.

x-enum-descriptions.needs_attention: Credentials expired or platform flagged; rotate.
x-enum-descriptions.retired: Removed from active use; kept for history.

x-enum-descriptions.ready: Ready for the customer to accept.

Platform.description: Destination platform. New values are additive; consumers must tolerate unknown values.

Via.description: Channel through which an action was taken.

x-enum-descriptions.agent: AI Member; permissions scoped by API key.

EventType.description: Stable event type. Additive; consumers must ignore unknown values.

x-enum-descriptions.account.needs_attention: A Social Account needs credential rotation.
x-enum-descriptions.delivery.ready: A Delivery is ready for the customer to accept.

ErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable error code. Additive; existing codes never change meaning.

x-enum-descriptions.invalid_input: 400 — Body/query fails validation. `details` lists field errors.
x-enum-descriptions.not_found: 404 — Resource does not exist in this workspace.

Post.description: A planned or published unit of content targeting one Social Account.

scheduled_at.description: Optional; if omitted the Post is created in `draft`.

timezone.description: IANA tz name. Advisory; `scheduled_at` is authoritative.

Asset.description: A media file used by Posts.

url.description: Pre-signed URL to PUT/POST the bytes to.

source.description: How this account entered the workspace.

SocialAccount.description: A destination account posts publish to.

credentials_ref.description: Opaque reference to credentials obtained via the connect flow.

Product.description: A purchasable offering in the Store.

Order.description: A record of a Store purchase.

account_ids.description: Optional narrowing to specific delivered accounts.

Delivery.description: The handover of one or more Social Accounts from an Order.

Activity.description: An immutable event recorded in the Workspace event log.

Member.description: A human or AI participant in the workspace.

prefix.description: First few chars for identification. The full secret is only returned once at create time.

ApiKey.description: A programmatic credential scoped to the workspace.

secret.description: The full API key. Shown once; store it now.

groups.description: Results grouped by resource type. Absent groups have no matches.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a prior response's `meta.page.next_cursor`.

FilterAccountId.name: account_id
FilterAccountId.description: Filter to Posts targeting this Social Account.

FilterAssetId.name: asset_id
FilterAssetId.description: Filter to Posts using this Asset.

FilterProductId.name: product_id
FilterProductId.description: Filter to Orders for this Product.

FilterOrderId.name: order_id
FilterOrderId.description: Filter to Deliveries under this Order.

Query.name: q
Query.description: Prefix + full-token search over resource-specific fields.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional. Repeats with the same key return the original response.

XRequestId.name: X-Request-Id
XRequestId.description: Client-supplied request id; echoed in the response.

OnBehalfOfWorkspace.name: X-On-Behalf-Of-Workspace
OnBehalfOfWorkspace.description: Operator-only. Perform the request against another workspace.

NotFound.description: Resource does not exist in this workspace.
